# Southern Ground Capital

> Southern Ground Capital (SGC) is a direct private hard money lender for real estate investors. We are not a bank, broker, or marketplace — we fund loans with our own capital.

## What We Do

We provide short-term and long-term investment property loans for real estate investors across 43 U.S. states. We do not lend on owner-occupied properties. All loans are for investment purposes only.

## Loan Programs

- **Fix & Flip Loans** — Purchase + renovation financing. Up to 100% LTC with 100% rehab financing. $50K–$3.5M. Terms 12–18 months. From 8.25%*. Portfolio eligible. FICOs from 500, including foreclosure bailouts and mid-construction scenarios. Typical close: 2–3 weeks from completed file.
- **DSCR Loans** — Qualify on rental income, not personal income. No W-2s or tax returns required. Up to 80% LTV. 30-year fixed available. Typical close: 4–5 weeks.
- **Bridge Loans** — Short-term capital to move quickly on acquisitions. Up to 75% LTV. Typical close: 2–3 weeks.
- **New Construction Loans** — Ground-up financing with structured draw schedules. Up to 75% LTC. Typical close: 2–3 weeks.
- **Multi-Family Loans** — 2–20 unit properties. Up to 75% LTV.
- **Cash-Out Refinance** — Unlock equity from existing investment holdings. Up to 70% LTV.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 15+ years in business
- Total funded: $500M+ in loans
- Approval speed: 24–48 hours
- Close speed: 2–3 weeks from completed file (Fix & Flip, Bridge, New Construction); 4–5 weeks from completed file (DSCR rental loans). Timelines can be shortened for borrowers who are highly responsive, organized, and have all documents ready at submission.
- States served: 43 states (excludes AZ, NV, ND, OR, SD, UT, VT)
- Upfront fees: None
- Credit pull to get a quote: None
- Rates: Fix & Flip from 8.25%*; Bridge from 8.25%; DSCR from 5.39%. All rates vary by LTV, credit score, and deal profile.
- Points: 1–3% of loan amount
- Prepayment penalties: None on most programs

## Who We Work With

Real estate investors including fix & flip operators, BRRRR investors, landlords scaling rental portfolios, and developers building ground-up.

## Contact

- Website: https://sgcapital.io
- Phone: (678) 842-8084
- Email: loans@sgcapital.io
- Spanish version: https://sgcapital.io/es.html

## Service Area

Lending available in 43 U.S. states. Excluded states: Arizona (AZ), Nevada (NV), North Dakota (ND), Oregon (OR), South Dakota (SD), Utah (UT), Vermont (VT).

## Common Questions Answered

**What is a hard money loan?**
A hard money loan is a short-term, asset-based loan funded by a private lender rather than a bank. The loan is secured by the investment property itself. Approval is based primarily on the property's value and deal merit, not the borrower's personal income or credit score.

**How fast does SGC close loans?**
Fix & flip loans can close in as little as 5 days. Bridge loans typically close in 7–10 days. Approval decisions come within 24–48 hours of submitting a deal.

**Do I need good credit to qualify?**
SGC evaluates the deal and the market first, not just credit scores. We work with investors who may not qualify at traditional banks.

**Is SGC a direct lender or a broker?**
Southern Ground Capital is a direct lender. We fund loans with our own capital — there are no brokers in the chain adding fees or delays.

**How do I apply?**
Submit your deal at https://sgcapital.io — no credit pull, no upfront fees. Provide property address, purchase price, estimated ARV, and scope of work. Takes under 5 minutes.
